user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Dyson
Product type: Airwrap hair styling tool
Tone: innovative, premium, empowering
Visual style: Clean, modern visuals with sleek product shots emphasizing technology and effortless elegance.
Conceptual technique: demonstrative product storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Curl, Smooth, Dry — All in One Airflow.
brief.caption: A stylish bathroom setting where the Dyson Airwrap is mid-action, with hair elegantly styled in the air, showcasing its multifunctional capabilities against a backdrop of minimalistic design.
brief.visual_style: Clean, modern visuals with sleek product shots emphasizing technology and effortless elegance.
brief.typography_style: Helvetica Neue, sleek and modern with fine lines
brief.color_scheme: Dyson's signature silver and purple with soft white accents
